compiled_state.author: Iso Tester
compiled_state.description:
Persist the finding PROSE in the `REVIEW_RESULT` sidecar so a remediation re-review can hand
the Pass-2 novelty sub-call its own prior findings. Today `build_payload._slim`
(`src/rebar/llm/plan_review/sidecar.py`) keeps fingerprints/decision/verification but DROPS
`finding`/`suggested_fix`/`checklist_item`. Add them (observability-only; the surfaced
verdict shape is untouched) plus a "latest REVIEW_RESULT for a ticket" reader. This is NEW
sidecar infrastructure, not an existing capability.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `_slim` persists `finding`, `suggested_fix`, `checklist_item` (sidecar event only) in `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/sidecar.py`
- [ ] A "latest REVIEW_RESULT for a ticket" reader is added (new)
- [ ] A test pins the surfaced library/MCP/CLI verdict shape is byte-unchanged
- [ ] The `RETAIN_PER_TICKET` prune bound and reducer-ignored forward-compat rollout are respected

file_impact.reason: Add prose fields to _slim + latest_review_result reader
Tests for new fields, reader, byte-unchanged verdict

compiled_state.title: Persist finding text in the REVIEW_RESULT sidecar for re-grounding
